news.t: Zacks Investment Management Expands ETF Suite with the Launch of SMIZ

holdings.infoBox: SMIZ is an equity ETF with a total of 218 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash & Cash Equivalents stock at 2.45%, EMCOR Group at 1.62%, Comfort Systems USA at 1.56%, Kulicke and Soffa Industries at 1.37%, and Sandisk at 1.32%.

overview.description: The Zacks Small/Mid Cap ETF (SMIZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund aims to generate positive risk-adjusted returns by investing in small- and mid-cap US stocks. The actively managed fund selects companies based on analyst agreement, magnitude, upside, and surprise. SMIZ was launched on Oct 3, 2023 and is issued by Zacks.

data.title: Zacks Investment Management Expands ETF Suite with the Launch of SMIZ
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zacks Investment Management, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Zacks Investment Research with $15.1 billion in assets under management, on Oct. 3, 2023, announces the launch of it...
